name: Jared Wilson
learned: Jared Wilson is a young journalist determined to uncover the truth about the Lawrence family and their curse. He has been investigating the estate’s dark history for months and becomes romantically involved with Ava. His research and journalistic skills help Ava uncover vital clues about the curse.
currently: Jared Wilson is staying in the village, interviewing locals and documenting his findings. His romantic interest in Ava deepens, and he becomes a valuable ally in the investigation, although his feelings for her sometimes complicate their work together.
lifestyle: Jared spends most of his time researching the curse and its effects, both in the village and in the mansion. He enjoys spending time with Ava, assisting her in uncovering the mansion's secrets. In the evenings, he writes articles and plans his next steps in the investigation.
